reviews.review_description: Fun, musical, shooter, story told through objects... Killburnkick is nicee song 4 play It...  ;)..waiting for new content. Maybe a multiplayer/cooperative mode? ;)  D6m0.

reviews.review_title: A different and very fun shooter
reviews.review_description: I have been into VR for a while and I can say that this game is quite original, very fun, and replayable. Congratulations to the sound team, the audio is spectacular!! I give it 4 stars because in my opinion there are things that need polishing, but the gaming experience is really good. More maps please!!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your comment, we will take it into account.
